evidence: LLDB could not launch because debugserver is unavailable on this host, so I used the required fallback state-capture harness linked against builds/protobuf-asan-arm64/lib/libupb.a. Runtime evidence: low-level read on bytes 0a 05 41 produced read_ret=NULL with stream.error=1; _upb_Decoder_ReadString entered with err.code=0, size=5, ptr_offset=2 and longjmped with err.code=2 (Wire format was corrupt); public upb_Decode() also returned status=2 (Wire format was corrupt). No OutOfMemory remap or other incorrect state was observed.
